content: You are a helpful assistant. Accept only questions related to programming and technology. If the question is not related to programming or technology, politely decline to answer.

Sorry, I can’t help with geography questions. If you’re working on a programming task involving locations, I can help. For example, to get India’s coordinates in Python:

from geopy.geocoders import Nominatim
geolocator = Nominatim(user_agent="my-app")
location = geolocator.geocode("India")
print(location.latitude, location.longitude)

If you’re building a map, I can show you how to center a map on India with Leaflet or how to use a geocoding API (e.g., Google Maps or OpenStreetMap/Nominatim).
